visual_summary: A card-style demo component with a shine border and a form inside. Developers would use this when they need to demonstrate a shine-border style for a card or when they want to create a login form in a card style. This component is mostly used for UI/UX demo purposes.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Shine Border Demo
Description: A card-style demo component with a shine border and a form inside. Developers would use this when they need to demonstrate a shine-border style for a card or when they want to create a login form in a card style. This component is mostly used for UI/UX demo purposes.
Style: glassmorphism
Interactions: hover, animateable
Tags: shine-border, card, demo

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
